documentation_impact.rationale: This shipment updates operator-facing procedures, handbook governance guidance, CI workflow triggers, persona operating duties, feature-memory records, and validation tooling, so documentation and reference stewardship obligations apply.

deferred_items.rationale: The legacy feature folder was retired and converted to backlog draft scope; remaining runtime-batch behavior is tracked as backlog debt instead of feature-memory implementation surface.
CI path filter narrowing shipped for phase-0a, while additional broadened trigger policy and regression hardening remain tracked as follow-on debt.
The pass consolidated debt handling into backlog tags and documented policy updates; broader US-7 debt scan execution remains explicitly backlog-tracked.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: The changes honor AGENTS working agreement by keeping the human ratification gate, avoiding commit/push side effects, producing the required ship-stage policy artifact, and preserving operator-output command conventions.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: The artifact records documentation-impact decisions and backlog-linked deferrals with explicit rationale, matching constitutional requirements for traceable stewardship and bootstrap best-effort enforcement.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Centralized OPERATION guidance, operator-output conformance checks, CI/workflow tightening, and memory/index cleanup support PRD goals for supervised pipeline operation, durable citation-backed memory, and auditable operator control.
